case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. IAO LEVENI

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,282.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LEVENI, IAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF; NOT APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT; VJ: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
